'''鈭歵h-d-j''' ('''thadaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultrascan|ultrascan]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultrascan|ultrascan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-d-j
|-
! Lemma
| thadaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadajithi|thadajithi]] || [[word:thadajiji|thadajiji]] || [[word:thadajishi|thadajishi]] || [[word:thadaji|thadaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadajuthuth|thadajuthuth]] || [[word:thadajujuj|thadajujuj]] || [[word:thadajushush|thadajushush]] || [[word:thadaj|thadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadajuthu|thadajuthu]] || [[word:thadajuju|thadajuju]] || [[word:thadajushu|thadajushu]] || [[word:thadaju|thadaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadajufuth|thadajufuth]] || [[word:thadajufuj|thadajufuj]] || [[word:thadajufush|thadajufush]] || [[word:thadajuf|thadajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadajethe|thadajethe]] || [[word:thadajeje|thadajeje]] || [[word:thadajeshe|thadajeshe]] || [[word:thadaje|thadaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadajothoth|thadajothoth]] || [[word:thadajojoj|thadajojoj]] || [[word:thadajoshosh|thadajoshosh]] || [[word:thadaj|thadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadajotho|thadajotho]] || [[word:thadajojo|thadajojo]] || [[word:thadajosho|thadajosho]] || [[word:thadajo|thadajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadajofoth|thadajofoth]] || [[word:thadajofoj|thadajofoj]] || [[word:thadajofosh|thadajofosh]] || [[word:thadajof|thadajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadaj忙th忙|thadaj忙th忙]] || [[word:thadaj忙j忙|thadaj忙j忙]] || [[word:thadaj忙sh忙|thadaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:thadaj忙|thadaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadajathath|thadajathath]] || [[word:thadajajaj|thadajajaj]] || [[word:thadajashash|thadajashash]] || [[word:thadaj|thadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadajatha|thadajatha]] || [[word:thadajaja|thadajaja]] || [[word:thadajasha|thadajasha]] || [[word:thadaja|thadaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadajafath|thadajafath]] || [[word:thadajafaj|thadajafaj]] || [[word:thadajafash|thadajafash]] || [[word:thadajaf|thadajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thadajasha|thadajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothadajasha|gothadajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithadajasha|gokithadajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thadajn眉sha|thadajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothadajnkn眉sha|gothadajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithadajn眉sha|gokithadajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thadajsh毛sha|thadajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothadajnksh毛sha|gothadajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithadajsh毛sha|gokithadajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadajrosha|thadajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadajnkrosha|gothadajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadajrosha|gokithadajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thadajmusha|thadajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadajnkmusha|gothadajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadajmusha|gokithadajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thadajsherasha|thadajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothadajnksherasha|gothadajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithadajsherasha|gokithadajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thadajngasha|thadajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothadajnkngasha|gothadajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithadajngasha|gokithadajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thadajyasha|thadajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothadajnkyasha|gothadajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithadajyasha|gokithadajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thadajyamasha|thadajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothadajnkyamasha|gothadajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithadajyamasha|gokithadajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadajn眉sh毛sha|thadajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadajnkn眉sh毛sha|gothadajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadajn眉sh毛sha|gokithadajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadajn眉rosha|thadajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadajnkn眉rosha|gothadajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadajn眉rosha|gokithadajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadajn眉musha|thadajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadajnkn眉musha|gothadajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadajn眉musha|gokithadajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadajsh毛n眉sha|thadajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadajnksh毛n眉sha|gothadajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadajsh毛n眉sha|gokithadajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadajsh毛rosha|thadajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadajnksh毛rosha|gothadajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadajsh毛rosha|gokithadajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadajsh毛musha|thadajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadajnksh毛musha|gothadajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadajsh毛musha|gokithadajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadajron眉sha|thadajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadajnkron眉sha|gothadajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadajron眉sha|gokithadajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadajrosh毛sha|thadajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadajnkrosh毛sha|gothadajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadajrosh毛sha|gokithadajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadajromusha|thadajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadajnkromusha|gothadajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadajromusha|gokithadajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadajmun眉sha|thadajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadajnkmun眉sha|gothadajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadajmun眉sha|gokithadajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadajmush毛sha|thadajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadajnkmush毛sha|gothadajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadajmush毛sha|gokithadajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadajmurosha|thadajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadajnkmurosha|gothadajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadajmurosha|gokithadajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thadaj|thadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙d忙j|th忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothadaj|hothadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙d忙j|hoth忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothadaj|hohothadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙d忙j|hohoth忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thadaj|n眉thadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙d忙j|n眉th忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thadaj|n眉n眉thadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙d忙j|n眉n眉th忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thadaj|n茂thadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙d忙j|n茂th忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thadaj|n茂n茂thadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙d忙j|n茂n茂th忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthadaj|luthadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙d忙j|luth忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthadaj|luluthadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙d忙j|luluth忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithadaj|lithadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙d忙j|lith忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithadaj|lilithadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙d忙j|lilith忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothadaj|kothadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙d忙j|koth忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothadaj|kokothadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙d忙j|kokoth忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethadaj|kethadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙d忙j|keth忙d忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethadaj|kekethadaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙d忙j|keketh忙d忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
